## Problem
What problem does this solve? What's the use case?

## Proposed Solution
Describe the feature. Include:
- Keybinding or command syntax if applicable
- Which existing tool does something similar (qutebrowser, Vimium, etc.)

## Alternatives
Any alternative approaches you've considered.
